basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
basic_details.short_information: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Technical Assistant Grade III Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 40 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters Degree in Marine Geology with at least 55 % marks or equivalent grade and laboratory experience of 2 years
qualification.details: Technical Assistant Grade III: Masters Degree in Marine Geology with at least 55 % marks or equivalent grade and laboratory experience of 2 years.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on marks obtained in the qualifying degree.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUSAT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUSAT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUSAT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III post is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant Grade III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters Degree in Marine Geology with at least 55% marks or an equivalent grade, along with 2 years of laboratory experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Technical Assistant Grade III post is between 18 to 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant Grade III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of ₹41,970/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Assistant Grade III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Technical Assistant Grade III post at CUSAT.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹950/- for General and OBC categories and ₹195/- for SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on the marks obtained in their qualifying degree.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the hard copy of the application?
faq.answer: The signed hard copy of the application should reach the “Registrar, Administrative Office, Cochin University of Science and Technology, Kochi-22”.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III recruitment?
